properties.name: Bang Pla Soi low-lying district
properties.nameTh: พื้นที่ลุ่ม บางปลาสร้อย
properties.describe: Historical king-tide flood corridor. Old shophouse district 0.5-1.5 m above MSL. Inundated 3-4 times per year during peak swell + spring tide.

properties.name: Bang Saen waterfront
properties.nameTh: ชายหาดบางแสน
properties.describe: Beach-front street + restaurant strip. Storm surge during October-November monsoon pushes water onto Coastal Road and into ground-floor shops.

properties.name: Muang Chonburi old-town drainage failure
properties.nameTh: เขตเมืองเก่า การระบายน้ำล้มเหลว
properties.describe: Aged 1970s storm-drain network. Heavy rain > 60 mm/h overwhelms the system and backs up into ground-floor stalls and homes. Mayor's #1 capital project priority.

properties.name: Kheha Chonburi housing estate
properties.nameTh: เคหะชลบุรี
properties.describe: Large social housing estate with inadequate cross-drainage. Knee-deep ponding after summer thunderstorms.
